title: The Weeping Dweller
description: A fun and scary mod for minecraft adds a dangerous dweller. The mod does not lag and adds everything to make you scared. With this mod is worth playing 100 per cent can scare you.
body:
Fun and scary mod for minecraft adds a dangerous and scary dweller to your world. The mod does not lag and adds everything to make you become scary and fun from the game. With this mod is worth playing 100 per cent, it will be able to scare you. With each of your deaths they will become more and more. He is very afraid of cats, so this is the only way to scare away dweller. The mod is translated into Russian and English.
You need the GeckoLib library to play the game.
